sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 348 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.4, 27 & 30 2. For orders on CMA No.2637/2024 3. For orders on CMA No.2638/2024 4. For hearing of main case 17.11.2025 Mr. Zohaib Hassan, advocate for respondent Learned counsel for respondent is present, however, applicant remains unrepresented and same was the case on the last date of hearing. It appears that the applicant Commissioner Inland Revenue Zone-III, CTO Karachi is not interested in the present proceeding. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
